subject: mtd: maps: fix error return code of physmap_flash_remove()
notes: Error-return pattern: function init err=0, takes goto on NULL/error check without setting err, label returns err. Caller sees success.

Initial query had Stmt vs AssignExpr type error; fixed in 1 repair iter by routing AssignExpr through getEnclosingStmt().
Query is generic: matches goto inside if-guard that follows an assignment-from-call, where path to goto leaves err sentinel unchanged.
POC sha256 frozen; no drift after compile/run.
